publicCandidateBuildScope.scope: future public Chrome Web Store candidate
publicCandidateBuildScope.hostPermissions: to be decided in future manifest milestone

permissionDifference: internal build may retain broad permissions; public build should either narrow permissions or carry final approved justification
evidenceDifference: public build requires store-ready privacy/support disclosure
public build requires final permission justification or narrowing QA
releaseRisk: public release risk remains high until manifest strategy is executed
